{"text": "By Kelsey Snell, Paul Schwartzman, Steve Friess and David Weigel, MURFREESBORO, Tenn. \u2014 Republicans in deep-red congressional districts spent the week navigating massive crowds and hostile questions at their town hall meetings \u2014 an early indication of how progressive opposition movements are mobilizing against the agenda of the GOP and President Trump.
